blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
